benefits.description: Severe pain from ankle surgery (7/10 level) reduced to zero after BPC-157 use. Continued benefit during hardware removal surgery after stopping BPC for 2-3 months prior.
BPC-157 injected near ankle surgery incision site (1 inch away) showed dramatic pain reduction

protocol_notes: Injected BPC directly near injury site. TB-500 injected subcutaneously in belly/fatty area. Protocol started 2.5 weeks ago, planned to continue for another month. Notes BPC-157 and TB-500 are synergistic with other peptides. Previous experience with BPC showed benefits 2-3 months before surgery even after stopping.
